---
name: Incident Report
about: Create a report to help us improve after an incident.
title: "[INCIDENT] <Title>"
labels: incident
assignees: ''

---

**Summary:**
<!-- Brief description of the incident -->

**Impact:**
<!-- What was the impact? Who was affected? How long? (e.g. 30 mins downtime) -->
- Severity: SEV-1 (Critical) / SEV-2 (High) / SEV-3 (Medium) / SEV-4 (Low)
- Duration: [start_time] - [end_time]
- Affected Systems:

**Timeline:**

- [time] Alert triggered
- [time] Acknowledged
- [time] Investigated logs
- [time] Mitigation applied
- [time] Resolved

**Root Cause:**
<!-- Why did this happen? (5 Whys technique) -->
1. Why?
2. Why?
3. Why?
4. Why?
5. Root Cause:

**Resolution:**
<!-- How was it fixed? -->

**Action Items:**
<!-- What will prevent this from happening again? -->
- [ ] Implement fix to prevent recurrence.
- [ ] Add better monitoring/alerting.
- [ ] Update documentation/runbooks.
